negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: robot_077
prompt: The video opens with a close-up shot of a robotic arm interacting with a clothes hanger with capri-length pants attached to it. The robotic arm, composed of black mechanical components, holds a pink hanger that is being used to hang the pants. The background features a pair of grey cabinet doors with silver handles, suggesting an indoor setting, likely a bedroom or a closet area. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the details of the robotic arm and the fabric. As the video progresses, the robotic arm with its gripper opens the right door by grasping the door handle with its right arm, while the left arm places the fabric hanger in the cupboard. The camera then shifts to a medium shot, capturing the robotic arm closing the cupboard and coming to rest. The scene emphasizes the precision and efficiency of the robotic arm in performing the task.
